summary: Frontend testing of Shree Veerabhadreshwara Constructions landing page. All major sections and features verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: Form validation does not show inline error messages when submitting empty form - no visible errors displayed

issues: Page title shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of company name 'Shree Veerabhadreshwara Constructions'

action_items: Fix page <title> in index.html to show 'Shree Veerabhadreshwara Constructions' instead of 'Emergent | Fullstack App'
Add visible inline validation error messages on contact form empty submission
critical_code_review_comments: Page title (document.title) is generic 'Emergent | Fullstack App' - should be branded for the company
Contact form shows no visible validation errors when submitting empty - should highlight required fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page fully functional. Tested: hero section loads with background slider, navbar transparent on load then transforms on scroll, mobile hamburger menu opens/closes, 6 service cards displayed, portfolio filter tabs (All/Residential/Commercial/Industrial/Interiors) work, lightbox opens on card click with X close button, 3 team cards, 6 certification cards, contact form has all required fields (name, email, phone, project type, budget, message, privacy checkbox), floating WhatsApp button present, back-to-top button visible, scroll progress bar at top, all nav links navigate to sections. Minor issues: page title is generic, contact form has no visible validation errors.
